data.title: Credit Faraday Future: A large sell-off of US dollars is expected by the end of this month.
data.description: Crédit Agricole stated that its month-end pricing model, after weighing all conventional drivers, points to a strong sell-off in the US dollar. "Global equities generally strengthened in April. In the foreign exchange market, the dollar weakened overall this month. In general, the stock market's performance—adjusted for market capitalization and this month's foreign exchange performance—suggests that month-end portfolio rebalancing flows are likely to lead to a broad-based strong sell-off in the dollar, with the strongest sell signal against the euro." The institution believes that, all else being equal, the euro is likely to rise further against the dollar. (Jinshi)

data.title: A suspected Block Street team address transferred 5 million BSB tokens to Bybit, worth approximately $3.65 million.
data.description: According to Arkham data, an address suspected to belong to the Block Street team transferred a total of 5 million BSB tokens to a Bybit deposit address (0xEcB8...0D51) in the past two hours, with a total value of approximately $3.6534 million. The tokens sent to this address previously originated from a multi-signature address belonging to the BSB team. Currently, the circulating supply of BSB is 207.75 million, and the amount received by this address represents approximately 2.41% of its total circulating supply. BSB is currently trading at $0.7595, down 9.11% in the last 24 hours, with a circulating market capitalization of approximately $157.8 million.

data.title: Core Scientific to Transform Texas Site into AI Data Center Campus
data.description: Core Scientific is set to transform its Pecos, Texas, location into a data center campus focused on artificial intelligence, with a planned capacity of up to 1.5 gigawatts. According to NS3.AI, approximately 1 gigawatt of this capacity will be available for lease. The company plans to convert around 300 megawatts currently used for Bitcoin mining into data center operations. Additionally, Core Scientific has acquired over 200 more acres to expand the site.

data.title: Billions Alters Token Unlock Terms with Bonus Options
data.description: Billions has revised its pre-TGE token unlock conditions, substituting immediate unlocks with alternatives that provide a 25% or 50% token bonus for extended lock-up periods. According to NS3.AI, the Billions Foundation announced that refunds will be processed in sequence beginning on May 19.

data.title: France Indicts 88 in Connection with Crypto-Related Kidnappings
data.description: French authorities have charged 88 individuals following a series of violent kidnappings linked to cryptocurrency, known as wrench attacks. According to NS3.AI, France's National Anti-Organized Crime Prosecutor's Office reported over 135 such incidents since 2023. CertiK noted that 71 incidents in 2025 resulted in losses exceeding $40.9 million.

data.title: AI Agent Payment Protocol Introduces New Stack
data.description: AI Agent's payment system is evolving beyond traditional transactions, introducing a comprehensive new protocol stack. According to PANews, this development signifies a shift in how payments are processed, emphasizing a more integrated approach. The new protocol stack aims to enhance efficiency and streamline operations within AI-driven environments, potentially transforming the landscape of digital transactions.

data.title: Italy's March PPI Annual Rate Rises to 4.4%
data.description: Italy's Producer Price Index (PPI) for March showed an annual increase of 4.4%, according to Jin10. This marks a significant change from the previous value of -3.70%.

data.title: Polymarket User Faces Significant Loss in NBA Playoff Prediction
data.description:
A Polymarket user, identified as mooseborzoi (0x84cfffc3f16dcc353094de30d4a45226eccd2f63), has incurred a loss exceeding $500,000 in a prediction event for the NBA Eastern Conference first-round Game 5 between the Atlanta Hawks and the New York Knicks. According to Odaily, the user invested $90,000 on the Hawks winning, with an average opening price of 31.2¢. The current price stands at 31.5¢, with a purchase of 288,833.4 shares.

The series is currently tied at 2-2, and the upcoming game is scheduled to take place at 8:00 AM (UTC+8) at the Knicks' home court. The Hawks will be without Randle, who is sidelined due to injury.

data.title: Investor Acquires $90,000 in Hawks Win Shares Amid Previous Losses
data.description: An investor, known by the wallet name mooseborzoi, has made a significant move in the Polymarket's Game 5 market against the Knicks. According to NS3.AI, the investor, who previously incurred losses exceeding $500,000, purchased $90,000 worth of Hawks win shares. This position was established at an average price of 31.2 cents per share, totaling 288,833.4 shares.

data.title: An account with losses exceeding $500,000 purchased $90,000 worth of goods in Game 5 of the NBA playoffs first round, in which the Hawks defeated the Knicks.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket "NBA Playoffs Game 5 Hawks vs. Knicks" prediction event, the account mooseborzoi (0x84cfffc3f16dcc353094de30d4a45226eccd2f63), which had lost over $500,000, purchased $90,000 worth of Hawks winning shares. The average opening price was 31.2¢, the current price is 31.5¢, and the number of shares purchased is 288,833.4. The Hawks and Knicks are currently tied 2-2 in the Eastern Conference playoffs. This game will be played tomorrow at 8:00 AM Beijing time at the Knicks' home court. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are priced in.

data.title: Pendle's Boros Platform Updates UI to Focus on Interest Rate Sensitivity
data.description:
Pendle's Boros platform has announced an update to its user interface, shifting the focus from position value and leverage to interest rate sensitivity and daily volatility as primary indicators for measuring position size. According to Foresight News, this change aligns with traditional finance's DV01 perspective used in interest rate swaps, adapting it to the on-chain funding rate swap scenario, which better suits Boros's trading environment.

The update will not affect any existing positions or orders, as only the display method is being altered.

data.title: Amber Premium Secures VASP License from Dubai's VARA
data.description: Amber International Holding Limited (AMBR) announced today that its Dubai subsidiary, Amber Premium FZE, has received a Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) license from the Dubai Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (VARA). According to Foresight News, this license permits Amber Premium to operate within the Emirate of Dubai and internationally, offering three regulated activities to global institutions and qualified investors as defined by the VARA rulebook: virtual asset brokerage services, virtual asset management and investment services, and virtual asset lending services.

data.title: Bitcoin Inter-Exchange Flow Pulse Rises 136% Since March
data.description: Bitcoin's inter-exchange flow pulse has increased by 136% since its low in March, according to ChainCatcher. On-chain analyst Axel Adler Jr. reports that the 7-day moving average has crossed above the 30-day moving average for the first time in several months, indicating a shift towards a risk-on mode. However, one indicator has yet to confirm this trend.

data.title: Iranian Crude Exports Drop Amid U.S. Blockade
data.description: Iranian crude exports have decreased by nearly 70%, reaching approximately 567,000 barrels per day, following the U.S. blockade of maritime traffic to Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, Kpler analysts indicate that Iran's unused crude storage capacity is limited to 12–22 days. Goldman Sachs projects that production losses in the Persian Gulf, amounting to 14.5 million barrels per day, are depleting global oil stockpiles at a record rate of 11–12 million barrels per day through April. The impact on revenue may be postponed by 3–4 months due to the time required for cargoes to reach China and the payment cycles involved.

data.title: Binance Wallet announced that the entry threshold for the second phase of the zkPass Booster event is 61 Alpha Points.
data.description: Binance Wallet has announced the participation threshold for the second phase of the zkPass (ZKP) Booster event. Users need to have 61 Alpha points to participate, and participating in the event will consume 5 points.

data.title: ZachXBT: WLD supply is expanding at an unsustainable rate, with insiders regularly holding it over-the-counter.
data.description: Chain Detective ZachXBT, writing on the X platform, points out that no one mentions Altman's other company, WorldCoin (also known as World), which launched the low-circulation crypto token WLD, comparable in size to SBF/FTX. They acquired biometric data from residents of low-income countries by giving away small amounts of WLD tokens. This technology, originally intended to verify human identity, has led to black market trading of verified accounts. The token supply is inflating at an unsustainable rate, with insiders regularly holding it over-the-counter.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Opens $23 Million Short Position on Hyperliquid
data.description: An anonymous whale address has initiated a new short position of 300 BTC, valued at $23 million, on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, Hyperinsight revealed that this address has successfully executed nine consecutive profitable Bitcoin short trades since the beginning of this month.

data.title: GANA Labs Announces Launch of New Interface and Product
data.description: GANA Labs has officially announced the upcoming launch of a new interface and product aimed at providing a more efficient, secure, and convenient digital asset payment experience for users worldwide. According to Odaily, GANA Labs emphasized its commitment to technological innovation as the core of its operations, aiming to create an open, transparent, and sustainable Web3 payment network. The company seeks to ensure that every digital asset transaction generates real value and contributes to transforming global payment methods.

data.title: Saudi Arabia May Lower June Oil Prices for Asia Amid Cooling Demand
data.description: Saudi Arabia is likely to reduce its official oil selling prices (OSP) for Asia in June, according to a survey of industry insiders. This potential price adjustment comes after spot premiums have declined and demand has cooled following weeks of supply disruptions due to the U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran. According to Jin10, four sources indicated that the flagship Arab Light crude's June OSP might be lowered to a premium of $7.50 to $14.50 per barrel over the average prices of Dubai and Oman crude, which is $5 to $12 less than the May OSP. The wide forecast range reflects ongoing uncertainty among Asian buyers. The anticipated price cut follows a significant weakening in the spot market since late March. Data shows that the Dubai spot price premium over swap prices fell to $9.17 on Monday, a sharp drop from the historical high of over $60 in March when supply was disrupted. Since April, the average Dubai crude premium has been $15.22 per barrel, less than half of March's average of $38.30, with Oman spot premiums showing similar trends. Respondents also expect other crude grades' June OSP to be reduced by $5 to $12. Saudi Arabia typically announces its oil OSP around the fifth day of each month.

data.title: GANA Labs' new interface and products are coming soon, aiming to drive the development of Web3 native payments.
data.description: GANA Labs today officially announced the upcoming launch of a brand-new interface and products, aiming to provide global users with a more efficient, secure, and convenient digital asset payment experience. GANA stated that it will continue to focus on technological innovation to build an open, transparent, and sustainable Web3 payment network, enabling every digital asset transaction to create real value and driving the transformation of global payment methods.
